helpful: The response-request history in the snapshot materially improved calibration.
The petition and opposition exposed both the asserted conflicts and the vehicle objections.
Paid-fee-class and circuit-specific statpack rates supplied an appropriate baseline.
gaps: The ranged corpus backend was unreachable because its hostname could not be resolved.
Only one of the two oppositions listed in the snapshot was provisioned.
notes: The MCP search remained available when the corpus-prior backend failed. No direct network fallback was attempted.
